name: ROLL
concept: 片月 / Half Moon — パラ柔術の最前線へ。Spin the World.

tees.label: ROLL ◐ MU
tees.hook: Core logo · ◐半月 + ROLL ワードマーク
tees.design_brief: Centered white ROLL wordmark in 100 weight sans-serif. ◐ half-moon glyph above in gold. Minimal, premium, hero piece. Black tee.

tees.label: SPIN THE WORLD
tees.hook: Bold horizontal kinetic type. 世界を、回せ。
tees.design_brief: Bold SPIN THE WORLD horizontal stacked white type, slight italic kinetic forward lean. Gold underline accent.

tees.label: 片月 HALF MOON
tees.design_brief: Vertical sumi-e brush '片月' kanji in white, with 'HALF MOON' tiny romaji underneath in gold. Centered chest.

tees.label: 回せ、世界を。
tees.hook: Brush calligraphy · ink black on white
tees.design_brief: Large sumi-e brush 回せ、世界を。 calligraphy in black ink. Centered, dynamic stroke with intentional ink splatters. White tee.

tees.label: ROLL #001
tees.design_brief: Small left-chest 'ROLL #001 / FIRST 100' typewriter-style print in red. Back: huge '#001' centered.

tees.label: NO PITY. JUST ROLL.
tees.design_brief: All-caps stacked manifesto type, white on black. 'NO PITY.' / 'JUST ROLL.' with ◐ separator.

tees.label: ONE TURNS ALL
tees.hook: Minimal · 片腕がすべてを回す
tees.design_brief: Minimal san-serif statement 'ONE TURNS ALL' in black on white. Single ◐→ arrow glyph. Centered, premium.

tees.hook: Pure half-moon mark · giant back print
tees.design_brief: Giant ◐ half-moon glyph centered back, ~30cm tall, gold fill with thin red outline. Small ROLL wordmark on front-chest.

tees.label: MAT · WHEEL · WORLD
tees.design_brief: Three-line stacked typography: MAT / WHEEL / WORLD with ◐ dot separators. Gold accent on WHEEL.

tees.label: 不可逆 IRREVERSIBLE
tees.hook: 魂の回転は止まらない
tees.design_brief: Kanji 不可逆 vertical right-side in white. 'IRREVERSIBLE' below in red ink-stamp style. Philosophical, dense.

rashguards.label: HALF MOON OVERLOAD
rashguards.hook: 巨大 ◐ がトルソーから袖まで bleed
rashguards.design_brief: Massive black-and-gold ◐ half-moon bleeding across torso into sleeves. Background deep matte black with subtle radial gradient. All-over print.

rashguards.label: SPIN GRID
rashguards.hook: 回転するタイポ・グリッド
rashguards.design_brief: Rotating SPIN type grid pattern in 4 directions, white on black, kinetic optical effect across torso.

rashguards.label: 回転 KAITEN
rashguards.design_brief: Giant black 回 brush kanji wrapping torso, with red ink stamp '回転 KAITEN' on right side. White sleeves.

rashguards.label: MAT TOPOLOGY
rashguards.hook: Grappling lines · 抽象トポロジ
rashguards.design_brief: Abstract grappling flow lines as topographic contour map. Black/gold thin lines on dark navy. Map of submissions visualized.

rashguards.label: ROLL THUNDER
rashguards.design_brief: Red lightning bolts across chest with bold ROLL wordmark in white. Power aesthetic. Black base.

rashguards.label: THE WHEEL
rashguards.hook: Wheelchair wheel as 神聖幾何学
rashguards.design_brief: Geometric wheelchair wheel motif as sacred-geometry mandala, gold lines on black. Subtle and elegant.

rashguards.label: PHASES
rashguards.design_brief: Eight moon phases horizontally from left sleeve to right sleeve, full moon ◯ at center chest. Black with white-gold moons.

rashguards.label: 前線 FRONT LINE
rashguards.design_brief: Large vertical 前線 brush kanji on chest. 'FRONT LINE' romaji on back. Red Japanese flag accent disc on right shoulder.

rashguards.label: ASYMMETRY 片
rashguards.hook: 片袖だけにプリント。非対称こそ美。
rashguards.design_brief: Intentionally asymmetric: print only on LEFT sleeve and left chest panel. Right side plain matte black. 片 kanji prominent.

rashguards.label: 無限 MUGEN ROLL
rashguards.design_brief: Infinity loop ∞ pattern in gold on black, tessellating across the torso. Small 無限 kanji on hem.
